mapper.sql: SELECT co.contract_id, co.contract_no, co.contract_name, co.contract_type, co.customer_id, co.opportunity_id, co.contract_amount, co.sign_date, co.effective_date, co.expire_date, co.payment_method, co.contract_status, co.user_id, co.dept_id, co.attachment, co.del_flag, co.create_by, co.create_time, co.update_by, co.update_time, co.remark, c.customer_name, u.nick_name as user_name, d.dept_name FROM mk_contract co LEFT JOIN mk_customer c ON co.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON co.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON co.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_contract (contract_no, contract_name, contract_type, customer_id, opportunity_id, contract_amount, sign_date, effective_date, expire_date, payment_method, contract_status, user_id, dept_id, attachment, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{contractNo}, #{contractName}, #{contractType}, #{customerId}, #{opportunityId}, #{contractAmount}, #{signDate}, #{effectiveDate}, #{expireDate}, #{paymentMethod}, #{contractStatus}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{attachment}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_contract SET del_flag = '2' WHERE contract_id IN #{contractId}
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_contract SET contract_status = #{contractStatus}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE contract_id = #{contractId}
mapper.select: WHERE co.del_flag = '0' AND co.contract_status = '2' AND co.expire_date < CURDATE()
WHERE co.del_flag = '0' AND co.contract_status = '2' AND co.expire_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY co.expire_date ASC
